reason: The item cleanly targets boundary-aware admissibility: what can be concluded about SEI species, thermal decomposition, and VC-driven pathway shifts without overgeneralizing beyond the stated storage/formation conditions. Decoys are largely single-fault and engineering-plausible (absolute stability, unsupported rate comparison, and universal extrapolation), creating meaningful separation for experts who track condition-scoping and mechanism-vs-claim strength. Minor risk remains that some solvers could see A/C/G as near-restatements of the prompt, slightly reducing discriminative challenge despite solid boundary traps in D/E/F.
